Off Calendar May-08-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT STORES NATIONAL BANK's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is off calendar. Parties stipulated to entry of judgment on April 18, 2013. Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Apr-08-2013 Continued To May-08-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT STORES NATIONAL BANK's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is continued on the court's own motion to May 8, 2013 to give Plaintiff the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than April 8 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
